title: Brain Rules: 12 Principles for Surviving and Thriving at Work, Home, and School (Book & DVD)
author: John Medina
targetAudience: Educators, parents, professionals, and anyone interested in cognitive science
relatedBooks: Mindset: The New Psychology of Success by Carol S. Dweck
The Brain That Changes Itself by Norman Doidge
Thinking, Fast and Slow by Daniel Kahneman
keyInsights: Understanding how the brain works can improve learning and productivity
The importance of exercise and sleep for brain health
Practical applications of cognitive science in everyday life
